author: lOrm
content: Spec extraction complete. 6 behaviors specified (B1–B6). 1 new gap filed as #604 (team memory, child of #523). G2 (semantic ranking) and G3 (extractMemories agent) noted as already tracked under #508. 6 OC test gaps enumerated (UTF-8 boundaries, trailing-newline edge case, whitespace-only file, HOME-unset path).
